# media-service Runbook

*Auto-generated by Milonexa AI Admin Agent v2.2 — 2026-03-11*

## Startup & Prerequisites

```bash
# Install dependencies
cd services/media-service && npm install

# Required environment variables
export PORT=<value>
export DB_POOL_PROFILE=<value>
export S3_ENDPOINT=<value>
export MINIO_ROOT_USER=<value>
export MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=<value>
export S3_BUCKET=<value>
export DATABASE_URL=<value>
export NODE_ENV=<value>

# Start the service
node services/media-service/server.js
```

## Health Check

```bash
curl http://localhost:8005/health
```

## Key Endpoints

- `GET /health`
- `GET /health/ready`
- `GET /metrics`
- `GET /debug/query-stats`
- `GET /url/:fileId`
- `POST /upload`

## Common Issues

| Issue | Likely Cause | Fix |
|-------|-------------|-----|
| Service won't start | Missing env var | Check all required `process.env.*` vars |
| Database connection error | DB not running | Start PostgreSQL and check `DATABASE_URL` |
| Port already in use | Previous process | `lsof -i :8005` and kill the PID |

## Rollback

```bash
git log --oneline -10  # Find the previous stable commit
git checkout <commit-hash> -- services/media-service/
docker compose restart media-service
```
